title: Copy.ai Cheat Sheet
description: Essential commands and tips for using Copy.ai effectively.

commands.command: Write a blog post about [topic]
commands.description: Generates a full blog post on a specified topic.
commands.scenario: When you need to create content for your blog quickly.

commands.command: Create a social media post for [platform] about [topic]
commands.description: Crafts a social media post tailored to a specific platform.
commands.scenario: When you need engaging content for social media.

commands.command: Generate a product description for [product]
commands.description: Creates a compelling product description.
commands.scenario: When launching a new product online.

commands.command: Write an email to [recipient] about [subject]
commands.description: Drafts a professional email based on the given subject.
commands.scenario: When you need to send a formal email quickly.

commands.command: Summarize this article
commands.description: Provides a concise summary of a given article.
commands.scenario: When you need to understand the main points quickly.

commands.command: Rewrite this in simpler language
commands.description: Simplifies complex text for better understanding.
commands.scenario: When a document is too technical or complex.

commands.command: Generate a list of blog ideas about [topic]
commands.description: Provides a list of potential blog post ideas.

commands.command: Create a catchy headline for [content]
commands.description: Generates an engaging headline for your content.
commands.scenario: When you need an attention-grabbing title.

commands.command: Translate this text to [language]
commands.description: Translates text into the specified language.
commands.scenario: When you need to communicate in a different language.

commands.command: Create a persuasive ad copy for [product]
commands.description: Crafts an ad copy designed to persuade customers.

commands.command: Generate a list of questions for [topic]
commands.description: Creates a list of questions related to a topic.
commands.scenario: When preparing for interviews or discussions.

commands.command: Write a personal bio
commands.description: Generates a personal biography for social profiles.
commands.scenario: When updating your LinkedIn or social media bio.

commands.command: Create a thank you note for [occasion]
commands.description: Drafts a thank you note for a specific occasion.
commands.scenario: When you need to express gratitude formally.

commands.command: Generate a list of pros and cons for [decision]
commands.description: Lists advantages and disadvantages of a decision.
commands.scenario: When weighing options for a decision.

commands.command: Act as a [persona/expert] and critique my [content/strategy]
commands.description: Uses role-prompting to get professional feedback on your writing or business ideas instead of just generating new text.

commands.command: Convert this [text/article] into a [format, e.g., Twitter thread, FAQ, or bulleted summary]
commands.description: Repurposes existing content into different formats to save time on multi-channel marketing.

commands.command: Analyze the tone of this text and rewrite it to be more [desired tone, e.g., professional, witty, or empathetic]
commands.description: Adjusts the emotional resonance of your writing without changing the core message.

commands.command: Extract the key action items and deadlines from these meeting notes
commands.description: Turns messy, unstructured notes into a clear, organized task list for productivity.

commands.command: Create a 7-day content calendar for [topic/niche]
commands.description: Moves from single posts to strategic planning by generating a structured schedule of ideas.

commands.command: Create a comparison table between [Product A] and [Product B] focusing on [specific features/price/use case]
commands.description: Generates a structured side-by-side comparison to help users make decisions or create comparison content.

commands.command: Turn this [raw transcript/notes] into a structured [format, e.g., SOP, step-by-step guide, or checklist]
commands.description: Transforms messy, unstructured information into organized, actionable documentation.

commands.command: Brainstorm 10 'counter-intuitive' or 'unpopular opinion' angles for [topic]
commands.description: Helps users break through creative blocks by generating unique, high-engagement perspectives that go against the grain.

commands.command: Draft a response to this [customer review/comment] that addresses [specific concern] while maintaining a [desired tone]
commands.description: A workflow for community management and customer service to handle feedback efficiently.

commands.command: Rewrite this text using the [specific framework, e.g., PAS - Problem, Agitation, Solution or AIDA - Attention, Interest, Desire, Action]
commands.description: Uses proven marketing copywriting frameworks to restructure existing content for higher conversion.
